commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: This external PR needs contributor proof plus maintainer scope/product review before any repair or merge automation is appropriate.; Needs attention: the PR includes an unrelated generated browser runtime rewrite in addition to UI localization.; Review finding: [P1] Move Vietnamese copy through the i18n pipeline — ui/src/ui/vi-dashboard-text.ts:3-4 - [P2] Remove unrelated diff viewer runtime churn — extensions/diffs... (sha=fa86016018b36ce0fffc2e848f2c784664a07cae)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds Control UI login/top-bar locale pickers, promotes Vietnamese to an eagerly loaded app locale, adds manual Vietnamese dashboard/settings copy with tests/docs, and includes broad generated/runtime/script changes.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection of the PR head shows the new inline Vietnamese helper and the large unrelated generated runtime rewrite. The full browser behavior is not fully reproduced because the supplied proof is copied output with local-only screenshot paths and no authenticated UI capture.
commands.review_followup: This external PR needs contributor proof plus maintainer scope/product review before any repair or merge automation is appropriate.

target.title: Restore Vietnamese dashboard updates for 2026.5.19
target.body:
## Summary
- Restores the 2026.5.19 Control UI Vietnamese dashboard updates.
- Adds the login/top-bar locale picker path and keeps non-Vietnamese locales from leaking Vietnamese fallback text.
- Fixes stale module-scope locale labels so Skills, exec approvals, and built-in theme descriptions resolve from the active locale at render time.
- Merges current `origin/main` into the PR branch to clear the GitHub merge conflict.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.ui.config.ts ui/src/ui/views/skills.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/nodes.devices.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/config.browser.test.ts` -> 3 files passed, 36 tests passed.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.tooling.config.ts test/scripts/plugin-prerelease-test-plan.test.ts` -> 1 file passed, 10 tests passed.
- `pnpm ui:i18n:check` -> all 18 locales clean, fallbacks=0.
- `git diff --check` -> passed.
- `git merge-tree --write-tree origin/main HEAD` -> produced a tree cleanly, no conflicts.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Control UI language picker, Vietnamese login/dashboard locale availability, and non-Vietnamese no-leak behavior.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw gateway serving Control UI at `http://127.0.0.1:18789/`, exercised with `/usr/bin/google-chrome` via Playwright headless.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Opened the local Control UI, inspected the login language picker, switched from initial Vietnamese to English, back to Vietnamese, then to German, and captured screenshots under `/tmp/openclaw-proof/`.

Evidence after fix:
- `/tmp/openclaw-proof/login-locale-initial.png`
- `/tmp/openclaw-proof/login-locale-en.png`
- `/tmp/openclaw-proof/login-locale-vi.png`
- `/tmp/openclaw-proof/control-ui-initial.png`
- `/tmp/openclaw-proof/control-ui-en.png`
- `/tmp/openclaw-proof/chrome-en.log`

Observed result after fix:
```text
Browser: /usr/bin/google-chrome via Playwright, headless
URL: http://127.0.0.1:18789/
initialSelectValue: vi
initialHasVietnameseOptions: true
afterEnglishValue: en
englishProof: {"hasLanguage":true,"hasSignIn":false,"noVietnameseSettings":true}
afterVietnameseValue: vi
vietnameseProof: {"hasLanguageVietnamese":true,"hasVietnameseOptions":true,"hasVietnameseCopy":false}
afterGermanValue: de
germanNoVietnameseLeakProof: {"noNgonNgu":true,"noCaiDat":true,"optionShowsDeutsch":true}
```

What was not tested: Authenticated top-bar/settings visual proof was not captured in this local session because the running instance was at the login gate. The render-time locale regression is covered by the added UI tests listed above.
target.author: manhhai999

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
